data.body: Remediated blocker f631a32f98b89c858 and advisory f0110cea0acb56fee by replacing the ambiguous dry-run/healthy language with four real no-bypass fixture cases, exact exit/status/reason oracles, and a required structured JSON evidence object whose pass rule is deterministic. Applied f122e6d6015ac4594 and f61f04782931b67c6 by adding explicit negative-scope and depends_on/blocks-normalization ACs. Resolved f5b5c5d2b56577f0c by making sibling stories the sole config-schema/golden owners; this dogfood story verifies their combined result and does not redundantly edit the golden. Applied ff6e83eed6abfc202 by adding docs/release-notes.md to file impact.
